summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable ignores core requirements. Task mandates TDD with bats tests, ALL tests running through act, and act-result.txt artifact—none present. Workflow lacks actionlint validation step and test execution entirely; only runs script once. Script itself is well-written (proper error handling, shellcheck-ready, good comments), but untested. No test fixtures or bats tests anywhere. Without test infrastructure, this is fragile and unsuitable to ship. Workflow structure is sound but incomplete for stated purpose.
